blocks.text: Owned the product strategy for re-architecting authentication to support enterprise SSO, delegated access, and faster onboarding — removing a critical blocker to revenue.
Legacy authentication patterns couldn't support enterprise identity requirements. Deals were delayed or lost because customers couldn't onboard teams under their existing security policies.

As Senior Product Manager, I mapped customer onboarding friction across sales, CS, and engineering — prioritizing capabilities by revenue impact and sequencing delivery to unblock the largest accounts first.
Partnered with security and platform teams on migration paths
Prioritized enterprise SSO and delegated access patterns
Aligned GTM teams on rollout sequencing per customer segment
$1M+ in revenue accelerated that had been held up by auth limitations
